title: Event Discount Management
toggleDesc: Toggle to activate/deactivate the event discount
allOrdersDiscount: All orders will automatically receive this discount
tip: Make sure to set both the event name and percentage before activating. The discount will be applied immediately to all new orders.

howItWorksItems.eventName: This will be displayed on receipts and order summaries
howItWorksItems.percentage: Applied automatically to all orders when active
howItWorksItems.global: The discount applies site-wide to all cart operations
howItWorksItems.history: All orders will record the event discount for tracking

toasts.invalidPercentage: Please enter a valid percentage between 0 and 100
toasts.missingNameBeforeActivate: Please enter an event name before activating
toasts.missingPercentageBeforeActivate: Please set a valid discount percentage before activating
